title: Fableized Elementary Staffs
description: Adds the old Elemenary Staffs from the Better Dungeon mod (Chocolate Quest) for newer Versions
body:
## Basic Information
This mod adds all Elementary Staffs from the old Better Dungeons Mod (also known as Chocolate Quest)!

The Essences that are required to craft these staffs, can be found in Dungeon Loot-Chests.

If you need these Staffs for Versions before 1.21.1 you can check out [Kroko's Elementary Staffs](https://modrinth.com/mod/elementary-staffs) for that.

This mods aims to continue the principle of the Elementary Staffs for more modern Versions of Minecraft and to balance and build apon of, with new features in the future.

**The Cooldown of the Staffs can be dis-/enabled with a gamerule:**
/gamerule enableStaffCooldown

## Crafting Recipes
